name: FIRÉZ 1800 Slimline
shortSummary: The FIRÉZ 1800 Slimline delivers an impressive widescreen flame display with an ultra-slim 190mm installation depth, ideal for luxury media walls where space is at a premium.
fuelBed: High-definition mixed log fuel bed with optional deluxe real log upgrade
alt: FIRÉZ 1800 Slimline electric fireplace installed in a contemporary bespoke media wall with television above.
seoTitle: FIRÉZ 1800 Slimline Electric Fire & Media Wall | Zebra Trades
metaDescription: Explore the FIRÉZ 1800 Slimline electric fireplace with panoramic 3D flames, smart controls and a space-saving 190mm built-in depth. Available supply only or fully installed by Zebra Trades.
